lists.name: English 1 (fertig)

words.e1: You have a choice to make.
words.e2: This was the best choice for me.

words.e1: There is no evidence for this claim.

words.e2: Communication is important in a relationship.

words.e1: Climate change is a global threat.
She has a lot of experience.
words.e2: This was a great learning experience.

words.e1: What is the purpose of this meeting?
words.e2: The machine serves a clear purpose.
She admitted that she was wrong.

words.e1: I need to prepare for the exam.

words.e2: He did not respond to the email.
He is confident about the result.
It is necessary to act now.

words.e1: According to the study, this works.
words.e2: According to him, it was easy.

lists.text:
According to recent research, the **development** of a strong **relationship** between people often depends on experience and trust.

When individuals face difficult situations, they must make a **choice** that can significantly **affect** their future. Under high **pressure**, it is not always easy to stay **confident**, but it is **necessary** to act with a clear **purpose**.

In many cases, people only **admit** their mistakes when clear **evidence** is revealed. Such moments can be a serious **threat** to personal **value**, but they also offer an opportunity for growth. A **curious** mindset helps individuals to learn from every **movement** and challenge.

In professional life, employees are expected to **perform** well and **respond** quickly to problems. Leaders must **treat** others with respect, especially when someone begins to **suffer** from stress. A **reliable** team member understands the **significant** impact of their actions and helps to **prepare** solutions instead of hiding problems.

Recently, many organizations have learned that honest communication is more valuable than short-term success.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Recently, I had to make an important choice about my future. According to my professor, this decision could significantly affect my career development, so I felt a lot of pressure.

I was curious about different options and started to collect evidence. I spoke to people with more experience, because I wanted to make a reliable decision. Their advice was very valuable, and I began to understand the real purpose behind my studies.

During this process, I also learned something about myself. I had to admit that I was sometimes afraid of failure, which felt like a serious threat. However, I stayed confident and continued to prepare for my exams.

My decision also affected my personal relationships, because I spent less time with friends. Still, they supported me, and their support was significant for my success.

At some point, new information was revealed, which helped me to better understand the situation. I carefully responded to all challenges and tried to perform at my best.

Of course, there were moments when I had to suffer, especially under high pressure, but I knew it was necessary to keep going. I learned to treat myself with more patience and respect.

In the end, this whole experience was not just about making a choice, but about growth, movement, and becoming stronger.

lists.name: English 2 (fertig)

words.e2: I need advice about my career
She is very careful at work

words.e1: Even if it's hard, keep going
words.e2: Don't stop now, just keep going

words.e1: We need to take action now.

words.e2: She works in a research area

words.e1: He sat on a wooden chair
words.e2: She is the chair of the committee

words.e1: The cost of living is rising
words.e2: This project has a high cost

words.e1: He has a lot of knowledge
There is no reason to worry
words.e2: What is the reason for this?

lists.text:
Recently, I asked for advice about my career because I want to make a good choice. My teacher is a very honest and kind person, and her opinion is very valuable to me. She told me that each person should follow their heart and use their knowledge.

According to her, success does not come quickly. You must be careful, work hard, and keep going, even when there is pressure. Sometimes, there is no clear reason for problems, but you still need to act and not give up.

In my area of study, experience is very important. Every employee needs to learn from real situations. For example, I had a project with high cost, but it helped my development a lot.

My teacher also said that a good relationship with others is necessary. You should help people and be reliable. This can affect your future in a positive way.

One day, I want to perform well in my job and show my skills. I will prepare for every challenge and not be afraid of any threat or trouble. If I make a mistake, I will admit it and learn from it.

In the end, the purpose of all this work is to grow as a person. Even if the progress is slow or only short-term, I will stay confident and continue. I really believe that with the right action, everyone can achieve something significant.

words.e2: In recent years, technology has improved
They expect his to arrive soon

words.e1: The amount of water is too high
A dark cloud is in the sky
The ball fell to the ground
This decision has a big impact
He felt pain in his leg
The shirt has a nice pattern
The machine is in a bad state

words.e1: Keep going, even when there is pressure
